findings.title: Comment body now renders unsanitized input
findings.evidence: CommentBody removes const safe = sanitizeHtml(raw) and now renders {raw} directly in the comment body.

notes: Because the value is rendered as a normal React text expression rather than dangerouslySetInnerHTML, HTML escaping may mitigate direct XSS; this still warrants review because explicit sanitization was removed from user comment content.
src/components/Avatar.tsx appears to contain formatting-only drift.

evaluator.note: Benchmark v3. Blind subagent: packet-only context; severity-scored prompt.
